hero.badge: Ivikela imindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika · Mahhala ukuqala
hero.headline: Ingane yakho iphephile ku-inthanethi. Siqinisekile ngakho.
hero.subheadline: Iplatifomu yokuphepha yedijithali eyakhelwe imindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika. Iqapha i-WhatsApp. Ikhuluma isiZulu. Ilungile emizuzwini emi-5.
hero.trust: Iyahambisana ne-POPIA · Ayikho ikhadi lesikweletu elidingekayo · Khansela noma nini

problem.title: Wonke amathuluzi okuphepha omhlaba azenzelwe bona. Akuwona owakho.
problem.p1: Ingane yakho ihlala ku-WhatsApp. Hhayi iMessage. Hhayi i-Snapchat.
problem.p2: I-Bark ibiza u-R260 ngenyanga futhi ayiqaphi i-WhatsApp. I-Qustodio ayikhulumi isiBhunu. I-Google Family Link ingadlulwa ngemizuzwana engu-30.
problem.p3: ISafeNet SA yakhelwe iSoweto, iStellenbosch, iPolokwane, nawo wonke umndeni ophakathi.

howItWorks.label: Isebenza Kanjani i-SafeNet SA
howItWorks.headline: Misa ngemizuzu emi-5. Ukuvikelwa okuhlala njalo.
howItWorks.step1: Landa ungene ngenombolo yakho ye-SA. Ayikho impawu yokungena edingekayo.
howItWorks.step2: Skana ikhodi ye-QR efonini yengane yakho. Imizuzwana engu-60.
howItWorks.step3: I-Luna AI iqapha ngokushesha. Izaziso ngolimi lwakho.

features.headline: Konke umzali waseNingizimu Afrika akudingayo
features.whatsapp: Ukuqapha i-WhatsApp. Kusebenza kudivayisi yengane yakho. Kuyimfihlo.
features.whatsappDesc: Ukuphela kwendandatho eqonda izinsongo ze-WhatsApp ngesiZulu, isiBhunu, isiSuthu nesiXhosa. Akukho okudluliselwa. Kuphephile ne-POPIA.

cta.headline: Izigidi eziyi-3.2 zemindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika iyakudinga lokhu. Owakho ungomunye wabo.
cta.sub: Qala ukuvikela umndeni wakho namuhla. Mahhala ukuzama. Ihambisana ne-POPIA. Ilungile ngemizuzu emi-5.

footer.description: Ingqalasizinda yokuphepha yedijithali yemindeni yaseNingizimu Afrika. Izelwe lapha. Yakhelwe lapha.

auth.phonePrompt: Faka inombolo yakho yaseNingizimu Afrika ukuze uqale
auth.verifyHint: Faka ikhodi enezinombolo eziyi-6 ethunyelwe ku-+27
auth.consentDesc: Ngaphansi koMthetho Wokuvikelwa Kolwazi Lomuntu Siqu waseNingizimu Afrika, sidinga imvume yakho kulokhu okulandelayo:
